status: exact Newman root external-field reduction with sign countermodels
proof_boundary: This artifact translates the Jensen D^-2 correction into the regularized Newman zero field, derives its positive stiffness and pair-flow expansion, and proves that no generic LP sign rule can control the field. It does not establish the required Xi-specific degree- and height-uniform balance estimate, exclude a positive Newman boundary, prove RH, or prove Lambda <= 0.

exact.canonical_product: At a real-zero time, F_lambda(s)=F_lambda(0)*product_(j>=1)(1+s/x_j(lambda)^2), with sum_j x_j^(-2)<infinity.

sign_countermodels.conclusion: Positive coefficients and Laguerre-Polya membership do not fix the sign of E_x or of the second collision correction.

cosine_equilibrium.interpretation: The arithmetic cosine lattice has zero center field.

rows.claim: At a real-zero Newman time, the squared-variable entire function has a genus-zero product over positive zero heights.
rows.formula: At a real-zero time, F_lambda(s)=F_lambda(0)*product_(j>=1)(1+s/x_j(lambda)^2), with sum_j x_j^(-2)<infinity.
rows.proof_boundary: Conditional on being in the real-zero regime.

rows.claim: Removing a double squared zero turns the regularized logarithmic derivative into an absolutely convergent root field.
rows.proof_boundary: One finite double zero at a real-zero time.

rows.claim: The derivative of the squared-zero field is a strictly negative sum of squares.
The squared-zero field converts exactly to the regularized field acting on the colliding Newman pair.
The signed-zero stiffness is an explicit positive combination of the squared field and squared stiffness.
The Newman zero ODE separates a universal pair repulsion from the regularized center field and stiffness.
rows.proof_boundary: Already-real simple pair for t>t_* only.

rows.claim: The first correction to square-root pair birth is coercive and governed by the positive signed-zero stiffness.
Positive coefficients and Laguerre-Polya membership alone allow either sign of the regularized field and second Jensen collision correction.
rows.formula: E=1 gives -3/64; E=-2 gives 9/64 at rho=-1, n=0
rows.proof_boundary: Abstract finite LP countermodels, not Xi trajectories.

diagnostics.conclusion: Positive coefficients and Laguerre-Polya membership do not fix the sign of E_x or of the second collision correction.

rows.claim: The doubled arithmetic cosine lattice has the exact field needed for zero center drift.

diagnostics.interpretation: The arithmetic cosine lattice has zero center field.

rows.claim: A closing root-measure route must prove an Xi-specific paired-cancellation and far-tail bound for E_x and K_x uniformly as zero height diverges.
rows.formula: control sum_j m_j/(x_j^2-x^2) and its square-denominator tail
rows.proof_boundary: Open height-uniform theorem; not a proof of RH or Lambda <= 0.
